nodes.name: RSS: CoinDesk
nodes.notes: Fetch CoinDesk RSS feed. Filter for Bittensor keywords post-fetch.

nodes.name: X API Search
nodes.notes: DISABLED until X API Basic activated (Phase 3). Enable when $200/mo X API is live.

nodes.name: Filter + Deduplicate
nodes.notes: Filter RSS items for Bittensor keywords. Deduplicate by URL. Track processed URLs in state file.

nodes.name: New Items?
nodes.notes: Stop if no new relevant items found.

nodes.name: Claude: Score + Draft
nodes.notes: Score each news item 1-10 for relevance. Generate draft commentary tweet. Process items one at a time.

nodes.name: Score >= 7?
nodes.notes: Only items scoring 7 or above proceed to drafts.

nodes.name: Write to Drafts
nodes.notes: Write high-scoring news items to queue/drafts/ with YAML frontmatter.

nodes.name: Discord: News Alert
nodes.notes: Notify Vew of high-scoring news item ready for review.
